title: AS 3600:2018 Column Fire Resistance Design
description: Calculate the FRP of a reinforced concrete column with AS 3600:2018.

section_shape.description: Shape. Symbol: Shape. Select a rectangular or circular column.

B.description: Width (B). Symbol: B. Units: mm. Rectangular column section width.

H.description: Height (H). Symbol: H. Units: mm. Rectangular column section height.

D.description: Diameter. Symbol: D. Units: mm. Circular column section diameter.

Lu.description: Lu. Symbol: L_u. Units: mm. Unrestrained column length.

Braced.description: Braced. Confirm whether column is braced or sway. Note, AS3600 : 2018 only contains guidance for fire resistance of braced columns. Refer Clause 5.6.2 for further information.

k_z.description: kz. Symbol: k_z. Effective length factor for bending about Z-axis as determined from AS 3600 Clause 10.5.3.

k_y.description: ky. Symbol: k_y. Effective length factor for bending about Y-axis as determined from AS 3600 Clause 10.5.3.

cover.description: Cover. Symbol: Cover. Units: mm. Concrete cover measured to outside of transverse (shear) reinforcement.

N_bl_rect.description: No. Bars. Symbol: N_{bl}. Number of longitudinal bars.

N_bl_circ.description: No. Bars. Symbol: N_{bl}. Number of longitudinal bars.

no_side_rows.description: No. Side Rows. Symbol: No. Side Rows. Number of rows of longitudinal side face reinforcement.

d_b_l.description: Longitudinal Bar Diameter. Symbol: d_{b.l}. Units: mm. Longitudinal reinforcement bar diameter in mm.

d_b_t.description: Transverse Bar Diameter. Symbol: d_{b.t}. Units: mm. Transverse (shear) reinforcement bar diameter in mm.

even_reo_distribution.description: Even Reinforcement Distribution. Symbol: Distribution. Confirm whether reinforcement is distributed evenly along all faces of the column. Refer Clause 5.6.3(c) & 5.6.4(e) for further information.

FRP.description: FRP. Symbol: FRP. Units: min. Required Fire Resistance Period (FRP) in minutes.

no_sides_exposed.description: Sides Exposed to Fire. Symbol: Exposure. Number of column/wall sides exposed to fire. For a circular column, select more than one side.

f_c.description: f'c. Symbol: f'_c. Units: MPa. Concrete characteristic strength in MPa.

f_sy.description: fsy. Symbol: f_{sy}. Units: MPa. Yield strength of reinforcing steel in MPa.

Nf.description: N*f. Symbol: N*_f. Units: kN. Design axial force in the fire load case.

Mfz.description: M*f.z. Symbol: M*_{f.z}. Units: kNm. Design bending moment about the Z-axis in the fire load case.

Mfy.description: M*f.y. Symbol: M*_{f.y}. Units: kNm. Design bending moment about the Y-axis in the fire load case.

mufi.description: μfi. Symbol: μ_{fi}. Ratio of design axial load in the fire situation (N*f) to ultimate strength in compression (ΦNu, i.e. linear projection of M*f and N*f on interaction diagram). If your value is between two options, pick the higher value.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
